raw_response_text:
```xml
<tbox>
    <!-- Class 34 (Thistle-like flowers) -->
    [Class_34] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([spiky_petal_structure]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([purple_blue_flower_color]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([central_spiky_cone]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([green_leafy_background]).

    <!-- Class 81 (Clematis) -->
    [Class_81] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([large_floral_blossoms]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([pink_or_purple_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([delicate_petal_layers]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([green_vegetation_background]).

    <!-- Class 88 (Nasturtium) -->
    [Class_88] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([bright_orange_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([prominent_yellow_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([rounded_petal_shape]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([green_leafy_background]).

    <!-- Class 71 (Azalea/Rhododendron) -->
    [Class_71] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([pink_or_red_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([smooth_petal_surface]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([prominent_stamen]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([green_leafy_background]).
</tbox>

<abox>
    <!-- Target Image Observations -->
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [spiky_petal_structure]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [purple_blue_flower_color]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [central_spiky_cone]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [green_leafy_background]).
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits the following visual features:
    - Spiky petal structure
    - Purple-blue flower color
    - Central spiky cone
    - Green leafy background

    These features directly match the necessary and sufficient conditions for [Class_34] as defined in the TBox. The presence of spiky petals and a central spiky cone, along with the purple-blue coloration, aligns with the discriminative visual patterns observed in the labeled examples for Class 34.

    No other class (81, 88, or 71) matches this combination of features, as those classes have distinct petal shapes, colors, and structural characteristics.
</dl_explanation>

<response>34</response>
```

raw_response_text:
```xml
<tbox>
    <!-- Class 34 (e.g., thistle-like flowers) -->
    [Class34] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([spiky_center]) and hasVisualFeature([purple_floral_cluster]) and hasVisualFeature([green_leafy_background]).

    <!-- Class 81 (e.g., clematis-like flowers) -->
    [Class81] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([large_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([multiple_flower_heads]) and hasVisualFeature([green_vines_or_leaves]).

    <!-- Class 88 (e.g., nasturtium-like flowers) -->
    [Class88] equiv hasVisualFeature([bright_orange_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([prominent_yellow_center]) and hasVisualFeature([rounded_petals]).

    <!-- Class 71 (e.g., azalea-like flowers) -->
    [Class71] equiv hasVisualFeature([pink_or_purple_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([smooth_textured_petals]) and hasVisualFeature([green_leaves_in_background]).
</tbox>

<abox>
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [large_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [green_vines_or_leaves]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [purple_floral_color]).
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits large petals and green vines/leaves, which aligns with the visual features of Class 81 (clematis-like flowers). The petals are large and clustered, and the background includes green foliage, matching the sufficient conditions for Class 81.

    The Target Image does not have the spiky center or bright orange coloration associated with Classes 34 and 88, nor does it have the smooth pink/purple petals of Class 71. Therefore, the Target Image satisfies the necessary and sufficient conditions for Class 81.
</dl_explanation>

<response>81</response>
```

```xml
<tbox>
    <!-- Class 34 (e.g., thistle-like flowers) -->
    [Class_34] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([dark_centered_floral_spikes]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([purple_floral_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([spiky_outer_segments]).

    <!-- Class 81 (e.g., clematis-like flowers) -->
    [Class_81] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([large_floral_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([delicate_stamen_structure]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([pink_or_white_petals]).

    <!-- Class 88 (e.g., nasturtium-like flowers) -->
    [Class_88] equiv hasVisualFeature([bright_orange_petals]) and
                  hasVisualFeature([prominent_vein_pattern]) and
                  hasVisualFeature([rounded_petal_shape]).

    <!-- Class 71 (e.g., azalea-like flowers) -->
    [Class_71] equiv hasVisualFeature([pink_or_red_petals]) and
                  hasVisualFeature([smooth_petal_edges]) and
                  hasVisualFeature([dense_stamen_center]).
</tbox>

<abox>
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [bright_orange_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [prominent_vein_pattern]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [rounded_petal_shape]).
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits three key visual features: bright orange petals, a prominent vein pattern, and rounded petal shapes. These features directly match the necessary and sufficient conditions for [Class_88] as defined in the TBox. The combination of these attributes (bright_orange_petals, prominent_vein_pattern, rounded_petal_shape) uniquely aligns with the visual characteristics of the labeled examples for Class 88 (e.g., nasturtium-like flowers). No other class in the provided examples shares this exact combination of features.
</dl_explanation>

<response>88</response>
```
